self_run.label: Run the program yourself

universal.label: Universal approach
universal.description: All eligible recipients in the selected country receive support.
universal.available: pre-assessed recipients available in this country
universal.empty_error: At least one recipient is required to continue.

targeted.label: Targeted approach
targeted.description: Support is provided to recipients who match selected causes and profiles.
targeted.matching: recipients match the selected country and filters

custom.label: Choose your own recipients

recipients.title: Recipients for program start
recipients.no_candidates: No candidates are currently available in the candidate pool. Please go back to Step 2 and adjust the selected causes or ensure candidates are available.
recipients.max_hint: The maximum is determined by the number of candidates currently available for your selected causes.

indirect_notice.tooltip: On average, each supported recipient positively impacts around five additional people in their household and community.

total_costs.title: Total program costs
total_costs.tooltip: {{recipients}} recipients x {{payoutPerInterval}} {{payoutCurrency}} payout per interval x {{numberOfIntervals}} {{intervalLabel}} = {{totalBudget}} {{displayCurrency}}

step4.title: Almost there
step4.description: Share your contact details so we can create your account and a default organization for you. Your new program will be created from the setup in the previous steps, and you can review it right after signing in.

validation.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.

step5.title: Your program is ready
step5.description: We created your account, organization, and initial program setup. Next, log in with your email to open your dashboard and start managing your program.
